notes: Excl. direct care staff costs and qualification costs. Per hour of patient contact.

Proxied from GP rate — in OLIDS GP appointment data these codes (consultant / associate specialist / trainee / locum) almost always represent doctors working a GP session so GP rate is the fairest proxy.
GP practice nurse. Cost per working hour excl. qualifications.
Proxied from HCA rate — Nursing Associates (R9809 / R9816) are AfC Band 4 like HCAs and ARRS-eligible at that band.
PSSRU 2024 Table 8.1 places Pharmacist at Band 6 — direct Band 6 rate.
Proxied from HCA rate — PSSRU 2024 Table 8.1 explicitly places Pharmacy Technician at Band 4 (same band as HCA).
Community-based scientific and professional staff Band 4. Cost per working hour 2023/24.
Band 7 rate (ARRS-standard band for PAs in GP settings). PSSRU Table 8.1 does not name PAs explicitly; Band 7 is the accepted AfC placement.
Proxied from Physician Associate (Band 7) — PSSRU 2024 has no dedicated per-hour Paramedic unit cost. ARRS FCP paramedics in GP settings are typically Band 7 so the Band 7 rate is defensible.
PSSRU 2024 Table 8.1 places Physiotherapist (specialist) at Band 6 — direct Band 6 rate used here as GP-setting FCP physios are typically Band 6-7.
PSSRU 2024 Table 8.1 places Counsellor at Band 6 — direct Band 6 rate.
Proxied from HCA rate — Care Navigators (R9801) are typically AfC Band 3-4 ARRS roles so HCA (Band 4) is an accurate upper bound.
Proxied from Physician Associate (Band 7) — ARRS MHPs (R9808) are typically Band 7 advanced practice roles.
Proxied from HCA rate — ARRS H&WB Coaches (R9807) are typically AfC Band 4-5; HCA (Band 4) is a conservative lower bound.
Proxied from HCA rate — ARRS Social Prescribing Link Workers (R9815) are typically AfC Band 3-4 so HCA (Band 4) is an accurate upper bound.
Default to Band 5 rate for unclassified clinical roles. Cost per working hour 2023/24.
Non-clinical roles (social workers / chaplain / welfare officer etc.) — no applicable unit cost.
Role code not in the SDS lookup — cost cannot be determined.
Admin roles are filtered out of int_appointment_gp_clean before costing; row present for completeness.
